title: Krabi、Krabi — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Krabi、Krabi的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Krabi是Krabi的一個城市，人口約60,000。A stunning coastal province with limestone karsts, pristine beaches, and a relaxed lifestyle that attracts expats and retirees seeking tropical paradise on a budget.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
